title: Discord4Fabric: Multiple Servers
description: Fork of Discord4Fabric, a popular discord linking mod, which allows you to send the chat to multiple servers, and fixes some issues
body:
### Empower your Minecraft <-> Discord(s) chat(s) experience(s) with features from DiscordSRV!


## Features
- Advancement, death, join, leave, server start, server stop messages!
- Webhook!
- Everything is customizable!
- Infinitely extensible thanks to Custom Events! (untested)
## Usage
- [Click Here](https://github.com/Reimnop/Discord4Fabric/blob/main/USAGE.md)
- You have to delete the D4Fservers config file to change the amount of servers lol, but don't worry it saves the other configs, just have to get ids and tokens again.

## Credits
- Uses [Placeholder API](https://github.com/Patbox/TextPlaceholderAPI) by [Patbox](https://modrinth.com/user/patbox)!
- Fabric API is required smh
